differential_diagnoses: Insulin receptor antibody syndrome (Type B insulin resistance)
Lipodystrophy associated with autoimmune connective tissue disease
next_steps: Assay for insulin receptor autoantibodies (Type B insulin resistance testing)
Repeat serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation for monoclonal gammopathy
Evaluation for systemic autoimmune disease including anti-dsDNA, anti-Smith, and ENA panel
Consultation with clinical genetics for lipodystrophy gene panel sequencing
Reassessment of insulin delivery technique and compliance via supervised administration
Discontinuation of unnecessary medications to reduce insulin-glucose demand variability

differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune connective tissue disease with secondary lipodystrophy
Paraneoplastic syndrome related to splenic lesion or underlying malignancy
Systemic autoimmune inflammatory disorder (e.g., undifferentiated connective tissue disease)
next_steps: Assay for insulin receptor autoantibodies (Type B insulin resistance testing)
Splenic lesion biopsy to evaluate for lymphoma or extramedullary hematopoiesis
Immunologic workup including anti-dsDNA, anti-Smith, anti-RNP, and anti-Scl-70 antibodies
Serial monitoring of complement C3 and C4 levels
Skin biopsy of the affected area to evaluate for residual inflammatory panniculitis
Consultation with a tertiary center specialized in lipodystrophy and metabolic disorders
Bone marrow re-evaluation in the context of persistent cytopenias and splenic lesion
